title: multi-channel tv
content:
been flipping between 3-4 channels for a while. i wish my tv can do this. :P

!/gallery/misc/multi-channels.jpg!


side note: i think i've been watching more BBC than CNN (or MSNBC). wondering why .. hmmm. (and yes, that's all i have with UBC.)

 %(me)and that thing up there is, of course, a fake. :)%
